metadata.title: Turning a Tight 2v1 with Smart Positioning and Calm Shots in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how smart positioning and calm aim help clutch a tricky 2v1 in VALORANT. Timing those angles right made the difference here.
What’s your favorite spot to hold the line?
Share your clutch moments below!

Drop your best clutch moments or tips in the comments!
